---
title: 'The LIFE In Fort Worth - DFW After Moving Checklist'
date: '2015-04-29T04:52:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_page_id: '8428652214388721470'
blogger_filename: '/p/the-life-in-fort-worth-moving-checklist.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
---

<h3>
This list will key you in to the thing you need to know, and connections you need to make, specific to the Dallas - Fort Worth (DFW) Metroplex.&nbsp;</h3>
<br />
<h4>
Relocation Orientation</h4>
<br />
<ul>
<li>What County are you in?&nbsp;</li>
<li>Register to Vote</li>
<li>Property Taxes</li>
<li>Government Buildings: Court Houses (for tickets), taxes, titles, etc.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Distances (Traffic/Freeways)</li>
<li>Schools</li>
<ul>
<li>K-12</li>
<li>Colleges</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<br />
<ul></ul>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Transportation</h4>
<br />
<div>
<ul>
<li>Drivers License: Update/Change within 30 days of moving to (or even within) Texas.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Auto: Register Your Car in Texas</li>
<li>Auto: Title Your Car in Texas (Surprisingly... not the same thing as registration).&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Living Quarters (Home/Apartment)</h4>
<br />
<div>
<ul>
<li>Utilities: Especially Electric (find out why here)</li>
<li>HOA/Apartment Rules (Know before you buy if you can)</li>
</ul>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
